description: Umeboshi plugin registry — maps backend types to active plugins. To switch backends, change the plugin name here. Plugins are auto-discovered from subdirectories matching their type.

transcribe.description: Converts audio/video files to text. Default: Fireworks Whisper API.

generate.description: Generates Anki cards from structured text. Default: Claude Code + DeepSeek.

import.description: Imports generated cards into Anki. Default: AnkiConnect (localhost:8765).
